docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EDMOND SAHAKIAN, CHIEF RISK OFFICER FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF LESLIE HARRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EDMOND SAHAKIAN, CHEIF RISK OFFICER WITH DEFENDANT WITNESS RICHARD HURBERT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LESLIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
